quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.CfnAbout:
A key performance indicator (KPI).

For more information, see [Using KPIs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/kpi.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.Actions.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.ChartConf.Description: The configuration of a KPI visual.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.ColumnHie.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.Condition.Description: The conditional formatting of a KPI visual.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.Subtitle.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.kpivisual.VisualId.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
